'''nosanaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:equational|equational]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-s-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:equational|equational]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| nosanaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:nosanithi|nosanithi]] || [[word:nosaniji|nosaniji]] || [[word:nosanishi|nosanishi]] || [[word:nosaniki|nosaniki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:nosanuthuthu|nosanuthuthu]] || [[word:nosanujuju|nosanujuju]] || [[word:nosanushushu|nosanushushu]] || [[word:nosanukuku|nosanukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:nosanuthu|nosanuthu]] || [[word:nosanuju|nosanuju]] || [[word:nosanushu|nosanushu]] || [[word:nosanuku|nosanuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:nosanufthuf|nosanufthuf]] || [[word:nosanufjuf|nosanufjuf]] || [[word:nosanufshuf|nosanufshuf]] || [[word:nosanufkuf|nosanufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:nosanethe|nosanethe]] || [[word:nosaneje|nosaneje]] || [[word:nosaneshe|nosaneshe]] || [[word:nosaneke|nosaneke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:nosanothotho|nosanothotho]] || [[word:nosanojojo|nosanojojo]] || [[word:nosanoshosho|nosanoshosho]] || [[word:nosanokoko|nosanokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:nosanotho|nosanotho]] || [[word:nosanojo|nosanojo]] || [[word:nosanosho|nosanosho]] || [[word:nosanoko|nosanoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:nosanofthof|nosanofthof]] || [[word:nosanofjof|nosanofjof]] || [[word:nosanofshof|nosanofshof]] || [[word:nosanofkof|nosanofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:nosanÃŸfthÃŸf|nosanÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:nosanÃŸfjÃŸf|nosanÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:nosanÃŸfshÃŸf|nosanÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:nosanÃŸfkÃŸf|nosanÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:nosanÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|nosanÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:nosanÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|nosanÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:nosanÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|nosanÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:nosanÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|nosanÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:nosanÃŸfthÃŸf|nosanÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:nosanÃŸfjÃŸf|nosanÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:nosanÃŸfshÃŸf|nosanÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:nosanÃŸfkÃŸf|nosanÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:nosanÃŸfthÃŸf|nosanÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:nosanÃŸfjÃŸf|nosanÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:nosanÃŸfshÃŸf|nosanÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:nosanÃŸfkÃŸf|nosanÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:nosanÃḊthÃḊ|nosanÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:nosanÃḊjÃḊ|nosanÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:nosanÃḊshÃḊ|nosanÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:nosanÃḊkÃḊ|nosanÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:nosanathatha|nosanathatha]] || [[word:nosanajaja|nosanajaja]] || [[word:nosanashasha|nosanashasha]] || [[word:nosanakaka|nosanakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:nosanatha|nosanatha]] || [[word:nosanaja|nosanaja]] || [[word:nosanasha|nosanasha]] || [[word:nosanaka|nosanaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:nosanafthaf|nosanafthaf]] || [[word:nosanafjaf|nosanafjaf]] || [[word:nosanafshaf|nosanafshaf]] || [[word:nosanafkaf|nosanafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:nosanasha|nosanasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:nosanshÃḋasha|nosanshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:nosanroasha|nosanroasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:nosanmuasha|nosanmuasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:nosanyaasha|nosanyaasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonosannkshÃḋasha|gonosannkshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gonosannkroasha|gonosannkroasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonosannkmuasha|gonosannkmuasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gonosannkyaasha|gonosannkyaasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:nosasanasha|nosasanasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:nosasanshÃḋasha|nosasanshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:nosasanroasha|nosasanroasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:nosasanmuasha|nosasanmuasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:nosasanyaasha|nosasanyaasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonosasannkshÃḋasha|gonosasannkshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gonosasannkroasha|gonosasannkroasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonosasannkmuasha|gonosasannkmuasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gonosasannkyaasha|gonosasannkyaasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:nesÃḊnasha|nesÃḊnasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:nesÃḊnshÃḋasha|nesÃḊnshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:nesÃḊnroasha|nesÃḊnroasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:nesÃḊnmuasha|nesÃḊnmuasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:nesÃḊnyaasha|nesÃḊnyaasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonesÃḊnnkshÃḋasha|gonesÃḊnnkshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gonesÃḊnnkroasha|gonesÃḊnnkroasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonesÃḊnnkmuasha|gonesÃḊnnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gonesÃḊnnkyaasha|gonesÃḊnnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:nosfanasha|nosfanasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:nosfanshÃḋasha|nosfanshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:nosfanroasha|nosfanroasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:nosfanmuasha|nosfanmuasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:nosfanyaasha|nosfanyaasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonosfannkshÃḋasha|gonosfannkshÃḋasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gonosfannkroasha|gonosfannkroasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonosfannkmuasha|gonosfannkmuasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gonosfannkyaasha|gonosfannkyaasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|b863984}}
